findings.evidence: `rg -n "The intended bridge hypothesis|finite-product factorization|Layer 6" roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability/README.md` shows the relevant targets at README lines 333 and 582-601; the PR description names no roadmap file or heading.
findings.fix: Update the PR description to name the specific roadmap file and heading/node, e.g. `TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability/README.md`, Layer 1 `product kernels, conditional independence, and mixtures` for the indicator-product factorization bridge and/or Layer 6 `directing measures and de Finetti representation` for finite-product/Kallenberg prerequisites.
findings.issue: The roadmap claim is too vague for new mathematical content: it says only `TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability` / de Finetti support, while this PR adds new APIs rather than only refactoring merged material.

summary: The added cylinder/indicator and process shift/cons/tail support has a plausible proximate path to the Exchangeability de Finetti factorization roadmap, but the PR description does not identify the required roadmap file and heading/node.
